creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear Ports-Secteam members,

I would like to MFH the union of these ports tree SVN commits back to 2016Q2:

- r415093, upgrade OpenVPN 2.3.10 to 2.3.11 to fix two security bugs (see below), but introduces POLARSSL regression (marked BROKEN)
- r415116, fixing POLARSSL regression and lifting the BROKEN tag
- r415180, marking OpenVPN < 2.3.11 vulnerable in security/vuxml/vuln.xml
- r415181, extending the vulnerability mark to the openvpn-polarssl package

Please review and approve of the MFH.

Thank you.

Best,
Matthias 'mandree@' Andree

Security: 0dc8be9e-19af-11e6-8de0-080027ef73ec
